---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to Fore
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case this feature would enable or the friction it removes.

Ideally give some markup examples.

**Proposed solution**
How you imagine it working (new element/attribute, changed behavior, etc).

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you considered.

**Additional context**
Links to related demos, XForms spec sections, or prior discussion.
